name: cloud build: the conformance requirements cite the grounding sources for the pillar
command:
cat > adr.json <<'JEOF'
{"decision_id":"0007-zt","title":"Zero Trust mesh","pillar":"security"}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-build.sh" scaffold --from-adr adr.json --tool terraform --build-dir build --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const c=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("build/0007-zt/conformance.json","utf8"));process.exit(c.grounding==="grounded"&&c.grounding_sources.includes("dod-scca")?0:1)' && echo grounded 1>&2
